snippet: The VSBA will contact schools approximately 2 months before their condition assessment to invite principals to attend an information session to learn how to prepare for their assessment. The VSBA has engaged a service provider to undertake the assessments. Following the information sessions, a service provider will contact the school to schedule the assessment and will ask schools to complete and return a pre-assessment questionnaire to record the school’s maintenance issues. It is also important that school asset management system (SAMS) plans are kept up to date so that the Condition Assessment Report includes all buildings and grounds. To update your SAMS plan, email any changes to the team at sams@education.vic.gov.au
